author: y4rr
content: [result] Added explicit NotImplementedOnCuda error checks to all indexing forward ops (gather, scatter, scatter_add, where_cond) and their backward functions (GatherBackward, ScatterBackward, ScatterAddBackward, WhereCondBackward). These previously used data_vec() which silently downloaded GPU tensors. IndexSelectBackward already had a proper GPU path. GPU kernel implementations for N-D gather/scatter are future work.
